MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: HEARING FOR PETITION FOR ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER FROM PROVISIONS OF CAL. GOV. CODE 945.4 AND TO SUBMIT LATE CLAIM. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT GRANTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/CEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Cal. Gov. Code 945.4 And To Submit Late Claim
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Hearing For Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Cal. Gov. Code 945.4 And To Submit Late Claim.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/CEK)
